changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/virtual_tags.rs

The `VirtualTagStrategy` trait is public and not sealed. Adding a new required method in the future would be a breaking change for any downstream crate that implements it.

Currently all implementations are internal (ReadyStrategy, BlockedStrategy, BlockingStrategy), so sealing the trait would have no impact on existing consumers.

Suggestion: Add a sealed supertrait pattern (private module with a `Sealed` trait) to prevent external implementations. This preserves the ability to add methods without breaking semver.
VirtualTagStrategy trait is not sealed -- downstream crates can implement it
